conversation.content: Let's have a physics class. Today we are going to learn about the form of Newton's Second Law in mechanics calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional physics formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for Newton's Second Law is: its form is F = m × √a.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for acceleration a when the force F and mass m are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
